telegram.start:
Rhapsody connects Telegram chats to team memory.

Choose a language below, then run /setup. After that, send a voice note, document, or meeting notes.

Core commands:
/meeting - analyze a meeting
/ask - ask team memory
/tasks - tasks
/document - add a document
/menu - command menu
telegram.menu:
Rhapsody menu

Memory: /ask, /topics, /topic
Meetings and documents: /meeting, /document
Work: /tasks, /task_done, /task_status, /decisions
Control: /digest_today, /digest_week, /attention, /reminders, /status
Projects and people: /project, /projects, /project_new, /project_use, /members, /people
Language: /language
telegram.setup_required: Select a project first: /projects or create a new one: /new_project Name
telegram.language_group_requires_setup: Connect this group to a project with /setup before changing the group language.
telegram.language_group_requires_manager: Only a project owner or admin can change the group language.
telegram.meeting_prompt: Send meeting text, a voice note, audio, video, or notes file ({types}).
telegram.document_prompt: Send document text or a file ({types}).
telegram.ask_prompt: What should I find in project memory?
telegram.task_number_prompt: Send the task number. You can see the list with /tasks.
telegram.task_status_prompt:
Send a task number and status, for example: 2 in_progress.
Statuses: open, in_progress, blocked, done, cancelled.
telegram.recordings_are_meetings: Recordings are processed as meetings. Use /meeting and send the recording there.
telegram.live_group_only: Live call listening is only available in Telegram groups.
telegram.call_recording_group_only: Call recording can only be connected in a Telegram group.

errors.generic: The request could not be completed. Please try again or check the service logs.
